name: Marquee Resources Limited
summary: Marquee Resources Limited engages in the mineral exploration activities. The company holds a 100% interest in the Clayton Valley lithium project located in Nevada, the United States; and a 100% interest in the Redlings REE project covering an area of 39.06 square kilometers located in Western Australia. It also has interests in the Centenario lithium project located to the west of Salta City, Northern Argentina; and the Werner Lake and Skeleton Lake cobalt projects located in Ontario, Canada. The company was incorporated in 2016 and is based in Subiaco, Australia.
